text:
is a 2nd year student at Attack Junior High School and Hange Zoë's assistant.

Appearance

Moblit has short, smooth brown hair parted down the middle and light brown eyes. He wears the standard male uniform of the school.

Personality

Moblit appears to be a loyal person, shown by him always standing by his upperclassman's side, despite their reckless behavior around Titans and the constant distress it causes him.

Story

Moblit is first seen following his upperclassman, Hange Zoë, into the Scout Regiment club room. When they start talking to a group of first year students about gruesome experiments on Titans, Moblit worriedly calls Hange out for their behavior.

Moblit is growing tired of Hange's naming ceremonies when they introduce their two captured Titans as Sawney and Beane to a group of first years. Moblit is later seen distraught and running after Hange, following the latter setting loose the two Titans to chase after them.

In the school's Sports Day, Hange participates and wins in the first race using Sawney. When the Titan attempts to bite Hange's head, Moblit fears for their life.

In the Biology Club, Moblit is present while Hange experiments on their Titans by tickling them, panicking when one attempts to bite Hange's head. Seeing the face Beane is making, Hange tells Moblit to sketch it.

Relationships

Hange Zoë - As their assistant, Moblit cares for Hange, constantly reminding them of how dangerous their actions are when around Titans. He fears for their life and is always distressed trying to keep his reckless upperclassman out of danger.
